title: cyclosorus excrescens
intro: Cyclosorus excrescens, also known as the leathery fern, is a type of vascular plant that belongs to the family Blechnaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is said to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and alleviating menstrual cramps. Cyclosorus excrescens is often prepared as a tea or infusion, and its rhizome can be dried and used in herbal supplements, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
